title: Competitor dossier: starter discovery trace demo
research_scope: Lightweight starter comparison for teams learning the ProductOS lifecycle trace model.

competitors.name: Jira Product Discovery
competitors.target_customer: Teams wanting connected discovery and delivery planning.
competitors.positioning_summary: Provides discovery capture, prioritization, and roadmap linkage to delivery.
competitors.go_to_market_motion: Expansion from the broader Atlassian ecosystem.
competitors.pricing_signal: Subscription SaaS with broader suite leverage.
weaknesses: Lifecycle explanation can still span multiple surfaces
implications: The starter trace model should make the full discovery story easier to review in one place.

competitors.name: Linear
competitors.positioning_summary: Unified product development workflow from roadmap to release.
weaknesses: PM audit lineage is not the main surface
implications: The starter should show why traceability matters before teams optimize for speed.
